The Rundown AI

Welcome back. AI moves fast — here's your rundown.

Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 tops the charts

Anthropic just shipped Claude Fable 5. Unlike The Neuron's angle, we dug into pricing: at $10/$50 per million tokens it costs double Opus 4.8, and early testers report single requests running 15 minutes on hard tasks. Analysts see it pressuring OpenAI's enterprise pipeline. Our pricing breakdown

EU AI Act enforcement begins

The EU started enforcing transparency rules for general-purpose AI models today. Providers must publish training-data summaries; fines reach 3% of global revenue. Full story

Unsubscribe here
